creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Vyskubov from comment #4)

Could you try reinstall libfm-qt6? 

# pkg upgrade -f libfm-qt6

Also, I'm running a headless computer but I'm using xrdp instead of vnc. I had the same issue some days ago and I did a pkg upgrade -f for fix it. Maybe you could run it like extreme solution if the command above doesn't work for you.
